title: EnableEvent Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub EnableEvent(Event As SpelEvents, Enabled As Boolean)
parameters:
Event	The event to enable or disable.

Enabled	Set to True to enable the event and False to disable it.
description: Enables certain system events for the EventReceived event.
notes: Use the EnableEvent method to enable system events. Several system events are enabled by default. See EventReceived.
see_also:
EventReceived

EnableEvent Example

VB Example:

With m_spel

  .EnableEvent(RCAPINet.SpelEvents.ProjectBuildStatus, True)

  .BuildProject()

End With

C# Example:

m_spel.EnableEvent(RCAPINet.SpelEvents.ProjectBuildStatus, true);

m_spel.BuildProject();
